CustomObject.label: NEPA Layer Discipline
CustomObject.description: Maps each NEPA_GIS_Layer__mdt DeveloperName to the specialist discipline, FSL WorkType, Work Order template fields, and discipline-specific Action Plan Template. CMT-driven routing — add a new record to extend coverage to a new protection layer without modifying flows. Discipline__c must exactly match ServiceResource.nepa_discipline__c for the team assembly flow to find the right resource.
